message:
feat(text,layout,extras): width caching, cursor improvements, extras hardening

Text Crate:
- Cargo.toml: Updated dependencies
- cursor.rs: Improved cursor positioning for combining characters
- width_cache.rs: Performance improvements for width calculations
- wrap.rs: Better line wrapping for complex Unicode sequences

Layout (cache.rs):
- Cache efficiency improvements for layout computations

Style (lib.rs):
- Additional style constants and helpers

Harness:
- time_travel.rs: Extended time manipulation utilities for testing
- golden_reflow.rs, golden_resize.rs: Test infrastructure updates
- isomorphism_proofs.rs: Enhanced proof verification
- resize_storm_e2e.rs: More comprehensive resize stress testing

Extras:
- canvas.rs: Minor painting optimizations
- clipboard.rs: Extended clipboard functionality
- forms.rs: Form validation improvements
- glowing_text.rs: Text effect enhancements
- markdown.rs: Fixed clippy warnings (unused mut, collapsible if, arg count)
- mermaid.rs: Diagram rendering improvements
- syntax.rs: Syntax highlighting fixes
- text_effects.rs: Added Cell import for release builds
- theme.rs: Theme system extensions

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
